creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

G'day Dan, 

Thanks for your submission, but this isn't the right solution.  I'm happy 
to elaborate further on why if you are interested.  My suggestion on this 
would be the creation of a 'cups-libs' port which installs the libraries 
and headers only.  I'd be happy to change the Java build over to use such 
a port.
